description: A guest calls the box office to purchase tickets in a wheelchair accessible section.

nodes.task_description: Identify the event the guest is interested in.
Check the availability of wheelchair accessible seating for that event.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds several available wheelchair spaces.

nodes.task_description: Ask the guest if they also need a companion seat.

expected_outcome.value: The guest requests one companion seat.

nodes.task_description: Sell the guest one wheelchair space and one companion seat, and process the payment.
